name: Glass Flush Mount Ceiling Light White - Threshold™: ETL Listed, Modern Decor, Metal & Glass, 2-Bulb Fixture
description:
Spruce up the look of your home decor in modern style with this Glass Flush Mount Ceiling Light from Threshold™. Crafted from metal, this ceiling light features a glass flush mount shade to provide eye-catching lighting to your space. The sleek design gets a little depth from the solid color, while the 1-way light setting makes for easy use. Whether you install it over your dining room table or in the living room, this flush mount ceiling light makes a stylish addition to your indoor spaces.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
